changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Reorder biorepository notebook pages: Retention & Disposal to page 4, Sample Request to page 5, QC Inspection to page 6

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 106
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 104
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 105
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 104
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 105
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 106

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Update nextPage references in biorepository notebook pages content

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'BIOREPOSITORY' AND name = 'Retention & Disposal'

changeSet.comment: Reorder biorepository workflow page templates to match new page order

update.where: workflow_category = 'BIOREPOSITORY' AND name = 'Sample Request & Retrieval'
workflow_category = 'BIOREPOSITORY' AND name = 'QC Inspection'
workflow_category = 'BIOREPOSITORY' AND name = 'Retention & Disposal'
workflow_category = 'BIOREPOSITORY' AND display_order = 106
workflow_category = 'BIOREPOSITORY' AND display_order = 104
workflow_category = 'BIOREPOSITORY' AND display_order = 105
